name: Peer-reviewed
description: PubMed-indexed journal articles and pre-specified systematic reviews. Highest weight for efficacy, immunogenicity, safety, and correlates evidence.

name: Clinical trial registry
description: ClinicalTrials.gov, EU Clinical Trials Register/CTIS, ISRCTN, and sponsor registries. Use for trial status, eligibility, locations, and primary outcomes.

name: Regulatory agency
description: FDA, EMA, Health Canada, MHRA, and official advisory committee material. Use for authorizations, labels, review packages, and vaccine composition.

name: Public health agency
description: WHO, CDC/ACIP, NACI/PHAC, ECDC, and national immunization technical advisory group guidance.

name: Developer communication
description: Sponsor press releases, annual reports, pipeline pages, and investor presentations. Treat as availability signals, not standalone proof of efficacy.

name: Landscape database
description: CIDRAP universal influenza vaccine technology landscape and other curated R&D pipeline databases.

name: Curator assessment
description: Evidence gaps, synthesis notes, and decisions made by dashboard curators. Must include clear rationale and date.
